seoTitle: Kurmond vs Kurraba Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Kurmond vs Kurraba Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kurmond and Kurraba Point.
heading: Kurmond vs Kurraba Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kurmond, New South Wales and Kurraba Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kurraba Point has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Kurmond (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kurmond or Kurraba Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kurmond has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Kurraba Point scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kurmond scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Kurraba Point scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kurmond or Kurraba Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kurraba Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
